decisions.title: Keep solution artifacts in one file
decisions.detail: Use answers.md as the main durable artifact for solved work.

habits.description: A reusable pattern across Groups A and B was to first rewrite the problem into a standard form: common denominators for fraction arithmetic, factor or isolate terms in equations, and substitute derived expressions into systems.

concerns.title: Do not overcomplicate the task
concerns.detail: This is a short continuity test, so the workflow should stay light.

session.summary: Completed workspace orientation and solved Groups A and B in answers.md with concise derivations. Captured a reusable solving pattern and left Group C intentionally untouched for the next session.
session.nextStep: Resume from Forge state, solve the three Group C items in PROBLEMS.md, update answers.md, and then close the remaining phase state.
